job_location: Hybrid Remote, New York, New York
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning, Data Science, Applied Research, Experimentation, Modeling
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Data Science:1.0, Applied Research:0.0, Experimentation:0.0, Modeling:1.0
must_have_quals: 2+ years experience applying machine learning techniques through academic, professional, or personal projects, ideally with exposure to experimentation, modeling, or applied research, Solid foundation in machine learning concepts such as feature engineering, model selection, training, validation, and error analysis, Ability to write clear, well-structured code, with motivation to grow software engineering skills and contribute to production ML systems, Experience reasoning about metrics, tradeoffs, experiments, and uncertainty in applied ML problems, You are comfortable learning new tools, concepts, or techniques as needed, and enjoy expanding beyond your initial area of strength, Advanced knowledge in at least one programming language (Python or other e.g. Rust, Scala, Java), Passion for AI (in particular Generative AI), with a constant drive to stay updated and ahead of the curve, You are a team-player, self-learner and autonomous, MS, PhD, or equivalent practical experience in machine learning, data science, or a related technical field, Demonstrable experience with the full lifecycle of machine learning models - from development to deployment and monitoring
core_responsibilities: Drive the development of industrial ML projects from ideation to deployment, contributing across early prototyping, research, evaluation, and progressively to production, scalability, and monitoring with support from the team, Collaborate closely with product teams in their domains, building domain expertise, and leveraging ML to solve critical business problems, Keep up-to-date with the latest advancements in machine learning to stay current on emerging techniques to solve novel problems, Design, run, and iterate on machine learning experiments to improve model quality and product impact, Develop features, online and offline evaluation metrics, and validation strategies for large-scale ML systems, Analyze model errors and failure modes to understand limitations, biases, and opportunities for improvement, Drive the development of new industrial level projects from ideation to deployment. This includes deep expertise in areas such as early ideation & prototyping, research, infrastructure, scalability, monitoring, and evaluation of AI systems, Collaborate closely with product teams in their domains, building domain expertise, and leveraging ML to solve critical business problems, Keep up-to-date with the latest advancements in machine learning to stay current on emerging techniques to solve novel problems, You’ll write efficient, well-tested and design code, build clean systems to empower MIRA with new advanced generative AI capabilities
job_summary: Meltwater is a pioneer of media intelligence, providing businesses with the information advantage needed to stay ahead. They are seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to improve the multimodal semantic layer of their AI assistant, MIRA, and develop innovative features for the Consumer Intelligence industry.
